adversarial.description: Full independent re-execution of all 16 contract-048 verification entries, extracted programmatically via json.load from .agent/contracts/048.json and run live from the repository root against the real, implemented (uncommitted) working tree at HEAD 68cb36f -- 16/16 exit 0 on the re-run (captured as the consolidated .agent/evidence/048/verification.txt, 16 EXIT:0 markers). The re-run is a genuine second full pass: the FIRST execution of the suite FAILED entry 6 (15/16) on a loose bare-substring count ('planned under' matched the new change_log summary as well as the two body sites -- NDEBT-014 class 4), and the first amendment's tightened single-line form then failed structurally because the References occurrence line-wraps (class 3); the final whitespace-normalized body-only form is recorded in the contract's amendments[0] with both rounds disclosed. Adversarial spot-probes beyond the suite: (a) GFM cell-parse of every | NDEBT- row with escaped-pipe neutralization -- 22/22 rows parse to exactly 5 cells and the NDEBT-019 rendered code-span is byte-identical to the documented command; (b) the E01 anti-vacuity entry re-confirmed against git show HEAD: for all six defects independently of the working tree; (c) diff.patch regenerated fresh and compared byte-identical to git diff HEAD of the five contracted files; (d) the 045 release-package invariants re-computed from primary sources (sha256sum of the checklist against the contract-045 pinned constant; git ls-remote tag enumeration = exactly 10 vX.Y.Z tags, no v0.7.0). No destructive command was run against any real repository path; no scratch probe was needed outside the repository read-only checks.
adversarial.process_note: Single-session execution (operator-directed review-response session, 2026-07-18): the same session authored and re-ran the suite; there was no separately dispatched evaluator. This is disclosed rather than simulated -- the durable artifacts (contract, amendments, 16 flat evidence captures, consolidated bundle, this record) are the audit trail, per the 047 precedent that fresh agents can reconstruct Loop 2 entirely from .agent/ state.

evidence_bundle_check.diff_patch_reasoning: diff of .agent/evidence/048/diff.patch against a freshly generated git diff HEAD -- <the five contracted files> produced zero bytes of difference at QA time (pre-commit, HEAD 68cb36f).
evidence_bundle_check.flat_files: All 16 flat 048-verify-NN.txt captures end with a literal [exit 0] line and open with the exact contract command they capture; the consolidated verification.txt carries 16 EXIT:0 markers in contract order.

acceptance_reconciliation.source: .agent/feature_list_005.json feature 048 (status set by the orchestrator at close-out, not by this QA record)
acceptance_reconciliation.summary: Feature 048's acceptance tests map 1:1 onto contract entries E02 (README truth-sync), E03/E04 (Sec-6 finalization passage + CLI consistency), E05/E06/E07 (bare-filename convention + module-wide zero-dangling sweep), E08/E09/E10 (NDEBT-019 pipe fix + NDEBT-023/024 registration + whole-register guard), E11-E14 (sweeps/e2e/045 invariants), E15/E16 (confinement + .agent immutability). No acceptance criterion lacks a passing, evidence-backed entry.

non_blocking_observations: The two round-2 straggler replies (PR #20 contested acceptance-check thread; PR #22 issue-vs-debt question) are reply-only dispositions executed after the close-out push, per the reply plan in .agent/planning_notes_048.md Sec 4 -- no file change, so no verification entry covers them.

CHANGELOG.md deliberately untouched (house precedent 046/047): the four governed ecosystem docs carry in-file change_log records; the [0.7.0] release section stays byte-stable for H-FRAMEWORK-RELEASE.

final_verdict.summary: PASS. Feature 048 (PR-stack review response, round 3: operator review of PR #21) is complete and correct as an uncommitted working-tree package (HEAD unchanged at 68cb36f at QA time). All 16 contract entries re-run 16/16 exit 0; both compliance sweeps green with exit status asserted (SUMMARY: 12 passed, 0 failed; SUMMARY (payload mode): 10 passed, 0 failed); e2e bootstrap green; 045 release-package invariants intact (checklist SHA byte-identical to the pinned constant, CHANGELOG.md and v0.6.0-release-notes.md untouched, 10 release tags and no v0.7.0 on the remote); tracked diff confined to exactly the five contracted files; no tracked .agent modification, untracked additions confined to the 048 in-flight range. The one defect found during verification was in the contract's own entry-6 assertion (two NDEBT-014-catalogued authoring classes, disclosed in amendments[0]) -- the deliverable content itself never changed after implementation.
